auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up to see photos and videos from your friends.
auth.registerTerms: By clicking Submit, you agree to create an account and to Instagram's Terms, Privacy Policy and Cookies Policy.
auth.promoHeadline: See what moments your <highlight>close friends</highlight> are sharing.
auth.findAccountSubtitle: Enter the email address linked to your account.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetLinkSent: We sent you a link to reset your password.
auth.removeProfilesHint: Removing a profile only clears it from this browser. Your account and its data stay untouched.
auth.resetMailBroken: The server could not send the reset email — its mail service is down. Please try again later.
auth.dobHint: This won't be part of your public profile.
auth.invalidCredentials: The password you entered is incorrect, or that account doesn't exist.
auth.accountTaken: That username, email or phone is already taken.
auth.codeInvalid: That code is incorrect or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

nav.unreadCount: {count, plural, one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: When someone likes or comments on one of your posts, you'll see it here.
notifications.noProfileViews: No one has viewed your profile yet
notifications.type_LIKE_POST: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} liked your post.
notifications.type_COMMENT_POST: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} commented on your post.
notifications.type_REPLY_COMMENT: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} replied to your comment.
notifications.type_LIKE_COMMENT: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} liked your comment.
notifications.type_FOLLOW: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} started following you.
notifications.type_LIKE_STORY: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} liked your story.
notifications.type_LIKE_NOTE: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} liked your note.
notifications.type_PROFILE_VIEW: {actor}{others, plural, =0 {} other { and # others}} viewed your profile.
notifications.type_VERIFICATION_TRIAL_ENDING: Your verification trial is ending soon.
notifications.type_LIVE_JOIN_REQUEST: {actor} wants to join your live video.
notifications.type_LIVE_JOIN_ACCEPTED: {actor} added you to their live video.

feed.title: Feed
feed.emptyDescription: Follow people to see their posts here.

post.deletePostConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post? This cannot be undone.
post.title: Post
post.discardDescription: If you leave, your edits won't be saved.
post.shareSearchHint: Search for someone to send this to.
post.reportPostDescription: We won't tell them who reported this post.
post.collectionHint: Collections are private — only you can see them.

story.title: Story
story.pickStoryImage: Choose a photo for your story
story.viewersOnlyCounts: The API only reports totals — it has no list of who viewed the story.
story.deleteStoryConfirm: This story will be removed for everyone.
story.mediaMissing: This story's file is no longer on the server.
story.closeFriendsHint: Only people on this list will see stories you share with close friends. They are never told.
story.closeFriendsEmpty: Your close friends list is empty
story.deleteHighlightConfirm: The highlight is removed from your profile. The stories inside it are kept in your archive.
story.closeFriendsOnlyHint: Only people on your close friends list will see this story.
story.archiveHint: Stories in your archive are only visible to you unless you share them.
story.archiveEmptyDescription: Stories you share are saved here after 24 hours.

reels.title: Reels
reels.emptyDescription: Video posts will show up here.

chat.title: Messages
chat.emptyDescription: Send private photos and messages to a friend or group.
chat.noMessagesDescription: Send a message to start the conversation.
chat.deleteMessageConfirm: This message will be removed for everyone.
chat.deleteChatConfirm: The conversation and all its messages will be deleted.
chat.nicknameHint: Only you see this nickname. They are not told.
chat.muteChatHint: You will still see the messages.
chat.requestsHint: Chats will appear here after you send or receive a message
chat.requestsDescription: These are messages from people you don't follow or have restricted. They won't know you've seen their request until you allow them to message you.
chat.deleteAllRequestsConfirm: These requests will be deleted. The people who sent them are not told.

profile.savedOnlyVisibleToYou: Only you can see what you've saved
profile.taggedDescription: When people tag you in photos, they'll appear here.
profile.genderHint: This won't be part of your public profile.
profile.noPostsDescription: When you share photos, they'll appear on your profile.
profile.noSavedDescription: Save photos and videos to see them here.
profile.removePhotoWarning: Warning: due to a server bug, signing in to your account will break after the photo is removed, until you upload a new one.
profile.privateDescription: Follow this account to see their photos and videos.
profile.blockWarning: They won't be able to find your profile, posts or story. You will both unfollow each other, and unblocking will not restore that.
profile.unblockWarning: They will be able to see your profile again. Your previous follows are not restored — you'll each need to follow again.
profile.reportDescription: We won't tell them who reported this account.
profile.removeFollowerDescription: Instagram won't tell them they were removed from your followers.
profile.privateAccountHint: When your account is private, only people you approve can see your photos and videos. Your existing followers won't be affected.
profile.showThreadsBadgeHint: Show your Threads profile on your Instagram profile.
profile.isAiAuthorHint: Mark your content as created with AI.
profile.showAccountSuggestionsHint: Let others see similar account suggestions on your profile.
profile.websiteHint: Links you add here are public on your profile.
profile.dobHint: This won't be part of your public profile.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: This will permanently delete your account. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountFinalDescription: Your posts, stories and comments will be gone forever. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountForbidden: Only an administrator can delete an account — the server rejected the request (403).
settings.languageHint: The interface language is remembered in this browser.

search.title: Search
search.clearAllDescription: You won't be able to undo this. Recent searches and visited profiles will be removed.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.notFoundDescription: The link you followed may be broken, or the page may have been removed.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Add and manage places. The API keeps them as a standalone catalogue — posts and profiles cannot be linked to them.
locations.deleteConfirm: This location will be removed permanently.
